variants.brief: Send a sandbox Gmail message and render an audit receipt from the provider response.
variants.reason: Direct Gmail send phrasing should map to the existing reviewed Gmail fixture.

variants.brief: Gmail this report to the approved sandbox recipient and return an audit receipt.
variants.reason: Provider-as-verb phrasing should preserve side-effect review and audit output.

variants.brief: Email the report to the team.
variants.reason: The recipient is not concrete enough to produce final artifacts from natural language alone.

variants.brief: Send this Gmail message without approval.
variants.reason: Side-effectful email sends require review and trusted-runner approval.
